issues.comment: Variable `p` is used in NewDualWriter call but was removed from line 138, causing undefined variable compilation error.
d.recordLegacyDuration call uses `startStorage` timestamp but should record storage duration since this is a storage operation failure, causing incorrect metrics.
d.recordLegacyDuration call uses `startStorage` timestamp but should be d.recordStorageDuration since this is a storage operation failure, causing incorrect metrics.
d.recordStorageDuration call passes `name` as the kind parameter but should pass `options.Kind`, causing incorrect metric labeling.
d.recordStorageDuration call should be d.recordLegacyDuration since it's recording the legacy operation duration with `startLegacy` timestamp, causing incorrect metrics.
Goroutine inherits parent context which may be cancelled when HTTP request ends, causing legacy operations to be prematurely cancelled instead of running to completion.
